understandCulture: Understand your school's safeguarding culture through the eyes of pupils, staff, and parents.
helpSchoolUnderstand: Help your school understand how everyone feels about safety, kindness, and bullying.
coordinatorPerspective: You haven't completed the diagnostic yet. Your perspective as a coordinator is important.
surveyCompleted: You have completed this diagnostic. View the results to see how different groups responded.
agreedActionsDescription: See what the school has committed to based on the diagnostic
noSurveyPupil: Your school hasn't started a survey yet. Check back soon!
noSurveyOther: There's no active diagnostic survey at the moment. Your school coordinator will let you know when one is available.
starMessage: Your answers help make your school a safer, happier place for everyone. That's really important!
respondentThankYouMessage: Your responses have been recorded and will help shape the school's safeguarding approach. The coordinator will share the combined results.
launchDescription: Launch a diagnostic survey to understand your school's safeguarding climate. Pupils, staff, and parents will each answer role-appropriate questions.
brilliantMessage: Your answers help your school be the best it can be. You should be really proud!
thankYouMessage: Your responses have been recorded. The coordinator will share the combined results.
